calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235
This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Petitioner Jun Ming Yu, father and Cui Qiong Liu, mother, was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Zi Ling Yu, Wan Qing Yu, and Kai Lin Yu.

Petitioners was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors, Zi Ling Yu to Amy Zi Ling Yu, Wan Qing Yu to Christina Wan Qing Yu, and Kai Lin Yu to Jimmy Kai Lin Yu.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
